article_title: Plug Power Wins 275 MW Electrolyzer Contract for One of North America's Largest Green Ammonia Plants in Quebec

content_preview.title: Plug Power Wins 275 MW Electrolyzer Contract for One of North America's Largest Green Ammonia Plants in Quebec
content_preview.summary: Plug Power will supply a 275 MW PEM electrolyzer system for Hy2gen's Courant project in Baie-Comeau, Quebec, a facility that aims to produce 230,000 tonnes of renewable ammonia per year to decarbonize the Canadian mining industry.
content_preview.body_excerpt: Plug Power has been selected to supply a 275 MW GenEco PEM electrolyzer system for Hy2gen Canada's Courant project in Baie-Comeau, Quebec, the companies [announced on April 2](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/02/3267217/9619/en/Plug-Power-Selected-to-Supply-a-275-MW-GenEco-Electrolyzer-System-for-Hy2gen-s-Courant-Decarbonized-Ammonium-Nitrate-Project-in-Baie-Comeau-Qu%C3%A9bec-Canada.html). The deal represents one of Plug Power's largest electrolyzer contract awards to date and...
